nodes.label: Pattern: Batch Run with Consolidated Analysis
nodes.norm_label: pattern: batch run with consolidated analysis

nodes.label: Pattern: Adding a New Executor (types -> catalog -> impl -> register -> sync frontend)
nodes.norm_label: pattern: adding a new executor (types -> catalog -> impl -> register -> sync frontend)

nodes.label: Pattern: Action Catalog Injection into LLM Prompt
nodes.norm_label: pattern: action catalog injection into llm prompt

nodes.label: Pattern: Inter-Node Data References via Template
nodes.norm_label: pattern: inter-node data references via template

nodes.label: Rule: Automatic AI analysis runs once after completion via runAnalysisAndRecord
nodes.norm_label: rule: automatic ai analysis runs once after completion via runanalysisandrecord

nodes.label: Rule: Create ActivityEvent with AI summary + recommended actions after run
nodes.norm_label: rule: create activityevent with ai summary + recommended actions after run

nodes.label: Rule: Batch runs use skipAnalysis:true per workflow and single consolidated AI analysis at end
nodes.norm_label: rule: batch runs use skipanalysis:true per workflow and single consolidated ai analysis at end

nodes.label: Rule: Executor name must follow {category}.{action} or {category}.{domain}.{action}
nodes.norm_label: rule: executor name must follow {category}.{action} or {category}.{domain}.{action}

nodes.label: Rule: registerNode must pass NODE_CATALOG_MAP entry for the node key
nodes.norm_label: rule: registernode must pass node_catalog_map entry for the node key

nodes.label: Rule: External API responses must be converted to standard types in executors/types.ts
nodes.norm_label: rule: external api responses must be converted to standard types in executors/types.ts

nodes.label: Rule: Auto-injected config fields (company_id, _context) are read-only for executors
nodes.norm_label: rule: auto-injected config fields (company_id, _context) are read-only for executors

nodes.label: Rule: Output key names must match outputSchema in catalog.ts
nodes.norm_label: rule: output key names must match outputschema in catalog.ts

nodes.label: Rule: Throw errors so engine records in workflow_step_runs.error and halts workflow
nodes.norm_label: rule: throw errors so engine records in workflow_step_runs.error and halts workflow

nodes.label: Rule: Error messages must be in Korean, understandable by end users
nodes.norm_label: rule: error messages must be in korean, understandable by end users

nodes.label: Rule: After adding executor, sync frontend nodeRegistry
nodes.norm_label: rule: after adding executor, sync frontend noderegistry

nodes.label: Rule: actions/catalog.ts defines all user-executable actions
nodes.norm_label: rule: actions/catalog.ts defines all user-executable actions

nodes.label: Rule: LLM must return structured JSON using only catalog type values
nodes.norm_label: rule: llm must return structured json using only catalog type values

nodes.label: Rule: context.ts provides {{nodes.X.output.Y}} template for inter-node references
nodes.norm_label: rule: context.ts provides {{nodes.x.output.y}} template for inter-node references

nodes.label: Prohibit: Never put raw external API keys directly in executor output
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: never put raw external api keys directly in executor output

nodes.label: Prohibit: Executors must not set auto-injected config fields (company_id, _context)
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: executors must not set auto-injected config fields (company_id, _context)

nodes.label: Prohibit: Never swallow errors inside executors
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: never swallow errors inside executors

nodes.label: Prohibit: No retry logic inside executors
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: no retry logic inside executors

nodes.label: Rationale: Standard entities decouple workflow outputs from external API shape changes
nodes.norm_label: rationale: standard entities decouple workflow outputs from external api shape changes

nodes.label: Rationale: Engine-level error capture ensures consistent step recording and halt semantics
nodes.norm_label: rationale: engine-level error capture ensures consistent step recording and halt semantics

nodes.label: Rationale: Dynamic catalog injection keeps LLM aligned with frontend handleAction capabilities
nodes.norm_label: rationale: dynamic catalog injection keeps llm aligned with frontend handleaction capabilities

nodes.label: Rationale: Consolidated analysis avoids redundant LLM calls across batch items
nodes.norm_label: rationale: consolidated analysis avoids redundant llm calls across batch items
